title: Marsdenia bourgaeana

This classification is based on the plant's morphological characteristics and molecular phylogenetic analysis. Marsdenia bourgaeana is further classified within the subfamily Asclepiadoideae, a subfamily of flowering plants that are often known as milkweeds or dogbanes. The genus Marsdenia is a group of flowering plants that are native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. Marsdenia bourgaeana is a species of flowering plant that is native to Central and South America.
